description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the "Monitor browsers' feature in Browscap before 5.x-1.1 and 6.x-1.1, a module for Drupal, allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the User-Agent HTTP header.
